title: OHS Hot Water Bottle with Plush Cosy Penguin Cover, 2L Leakproof Large Hot Water Bag for Neck Shoulder Hand Feet Warmer and Pain Relief Ideal for Adults Kids, Grey
features: Novelty Hot Water Bottle: This hot water bottle comes with a soft, cuddly penguin-themed plush cover, making it extra cosy and perfect for both adults and kids to snuggle with for warmth and comfort.

Perfect for All Ages: Suitable for both adults and children, this hot water bottle offers a safe, gentle way to stay warm and comfortable in the colder months, making it a great addition to any household. The cover is designed to keep the bottle warm for longer and prevent direct contact with your skin, whilst looking super cute at the same time.
2L Leakproof Design: Designed with safety in mind, this 2 litre hot water bottle features a leakproof seal to prevent spills and ensure reliable heat retention, providing lasting warmth for hours.

Versatile Pain Relief & Warmth: Ideal for soothing sore muscles, alleviating neck and shoulder tension, or simply warming up cold feet, this hot water bag provides targeted relief and comfort for various aches and pains.

Easy to Use & Maintain: Simply fill the bottle with hot water to enjoy soothing warmth wherever you need it. The plush cover is removable and machine washable 30°C, ensuring long-lasting use and cleanliness.
description: Experience ultimate comfort and warmth with the OHS Hot Water Bottle with Plush Cosy Penguin Cover. This 2L hot water bottle features a cute and cuddly penguin design, adding a touch of charm while offering soothing relief for sore muscles, neck and shoulder tension, or cold hands and feet. Made with a leakproof, secure cap, this large hot water bottle retains heat for hours, ensuring long-lasting warmth and comfort. The plush, grey penguin cover enhances the experience, making it perfect for both adults and children to snuggle up with during the colder months. Ideal for pain relief, this versatile hot water bottle is a go-to for tackling everyday aches, cramps, or simply warming up on a chilly evening. Easy to use and maintain, the cover is removable for hassle-free cleaning. Whether you need a personal warmer or a thoughtful gift, the OHS Hot Water Bottle offers comfort, safety, and style in one cosy package. Brand: OHS Item volume: 2 Litre Colour: Grey Style: Penguin Material: Polyester Age range (description): All Ages
